description: Renovate opens bump PRs into the existing branch→PR→merge→git-pull-on-box deploy flow. See docs/APP_UPDATES.md. Auto-merge is deliberately OFF everywhere: this stack holds members' photos and passwords — a human reviews every bump, and deploy to the box is a separate manual step.

packageRules.description: Stateful / identity-critical services: never batch, call them out loudly. A bad update here is a trust event — read the release notes before merging, snapshot/backup before deploying.

Ente ships only a rolling `latest` (no version tags), so it's pinned by digest in compose. Enable digest pinning/updates so Renovate PRs when latest's digest moves; it's the service holding the photos, so every bump is a deliberate, read-the-notes event.
Postgres: major upgrades require a dump/restore migration, not a tag bump. Only take minor/patch within 15.x.
Jellyfin: track stable only — no release candidates (memory: 12.0-rc explicitly rejected).
Vaultwarden fork (timshel/oidcwarden) uses vYYYY.M.P-N tags; loose versioning so Renovate can order them.
